title: calamintha calamintha
intro: Calamintha calamintha, also known as lesser calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is native to Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant. The health benefits of Calamintha calamintha include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as relief from respiratory issues, such as colds and bronchitis. Calamintha calamintha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and ease symptoms of various health conditions.
